statement.p: Which of the following is true about the formulas used for calculations with mortgages?

ol.li: They are the same as for annuities.
They are the same as for installment loans.
They are the same as for compound interest.
They are completely different from all other formulas we have encountered in the course so far.
There are no formulas for mortgages.

ul.li: B: They are the same as for installment loans.
